---
title: "3b: Heaps' Law — Pangenome Growth Analysis"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
---

## Summary

Heaps' law models pangenome growth as genomes are accumulated: $G(n) = \kappa \cdot n^\gamma$. A gamma (lambda) value below 1 indicates an open pangenome where new genes continue to appear as more genomes are added.

```{python}
import pandas as pd
summary = pd.read_csv("../output/data/3b_heaps_summary.csv")
summary
```

## Heaps' Law Stacked Plot

![](../output/figures/3b_heaps_law.png){width=90%}
